_comment: PCP custom furniture sprite definitions. Used by generate_furniture_sprite.py, build_tilesheet.py, and generate_tiles_txt.py.

items.description: A tall cylindrical bio-reactor tank made from welded scrap steel and salvaged industrial parts. Worn brushed steel exterior with light patina and visible weld seams. Copper pipe fittings on top with a pressure release valve. The tank sits on a crude welded angle-iron frame with four legs. Industrial, improvised, post-apocalyptic. Nearly floor-to-ceiling height, a tall imposing vessel that dominates the tile.

facing_details.S: Front view showing a round analogue pressure gauge and a temperature dial bolted to the upper front, with a hinged access panel below.
facing_details.E: Right side view showing a copper pipe manifold with three horizontal pipes and a large side-mounted valve wheel.
facing_details.N: Back view showing a rectangular exhaust vent grille at the top, an electrical conduit running down the side, and a faded warning stencil.
facing_details.W: Left side view showing a drain spigot near the bottom, a vertical glass sight tube showing fluid level, and a welded steel repair patch.
